holdings.name: Apple Inc
holdings.description: World's most valuable company by market cap. iPhone ecosystem, Mac, iPad, Wearables and Services (App Store, Apple TV+, iCloud). $100B+ annual buyback. Pricing power drives 40%+ service margins.

holdings.name: Microsoft Corp
holdings.description: Enterprise cloud (Azure #2 globally), Office 365, GitHub, LinkedIn, Xbox. Copilot AI integration across all products. $3T market cap. Azure growing 30%+ YoY — key AI infrastructure beneficiary.

holdings.name: NVIDIA Corp
holdings.description: GPU monopoly for AI training and inference. Data center revenue >$80B annualised run-rate. H100 and H200 chips powering every major AI model (GPT, Gemini, Claude). CUDA software moat makes switching nearly impossible.

holdings.name: Amazon.com Inc
holdings.description: AWS (Amazon Web Services) is the world's largest cloud platform (~33% share). E-commerce operations generate flywheel data for AI/ML. Advertising business growing 20%+ annually. Prime membership 200M+ globally.

holdings.name: Meta Platforms Inc
holdings.description: Facebook + Instagram + WhatsApp = 3.5B daily active users. Ad targeting via Meta AI maximises ARPU. Reality Labs (Quest headsets) pursuing long-term metaverse opportunity. $50B+ FCF annual generation.

holdings.name: Alphabet Inc (Google)
holdings.description: Google Search (90%+ global market share), YouTube, Google Cloud and Android ecosystem. Gemini AI model powering search generative experience. Waymo autonomous vehicle business. $60B+ annual FCF.
